hero_portofino_table.description: Photorealistic aerial view of a luxury restaurant terrace in Portofino, Italy, golden hour light, colorful pastel houses cascading down the cliffside, turquoise Mediterranean sea below, a beautifully set table with Italian dishes — pasta, seafood, wine glasses — white linen tablecloth, flowers, elegant candlelight, cinematic photography, luxury lifestyle, bokeh, shot from above at a slight angle, Vogue editorial style
